Title: Ellipsoid Density
Description: The Ellipsoid is a deformed Sphere. You can use a Scale vector to stretch and compress the Sphere in different directions. You can spin it by giving it a new Y axis and a spin angle (in degrees).

Options.Label: Spin
Options.Description: Determines the angle in degrees by which to spin the Ellipsoid around its Y axis.

Outputs.Label: Curve
Outputs.Description: Maps the Distance from the origin to a Density value.

Outputs.Label: Scale
Outputs.Description: Determines how much to stretch the Sphere in each direction.

Outputs.Label: NewYAxis
Outputs.Description: Let’s you rotate the field around its origin.
